title: 0xNyk/council-of-high-intelligence
abstract: 18 AI personas deliberate your hardest decisions across multiple LLM providers. Aristotle, Feynman, Kahneman, Torvalds & more — structured multi-round deliberation with genuine model diversity. One command: /council
abstract_zh: 别再自己搞不定那些头疼的问题了！来吧，叫上 Aristotle 来讲讲道德，让 Feynman 解释物理，Kahneman 分析决策，Torvalds 则教你编程。十八路 AI 高人齐聚一堂，多轮讨论，给你最全面的答案。一键操作：/council。妥妥的智慧盛宴！
